chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.288 of 2017 Mst. Sanawar Begum Versus Govt. of Sindh and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2038/2017 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 13.02.2024 None present for the appellant. Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. None present for the appellant who was also called absent on the last date of hearing and so also on 31.05.2022. This is a third date of hearing when the appellant and her counsel are called absent. The appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
